output.setting: A decaying neo-noir megacity district obscured by permanent acid fog

pickup.name: Frequency Modulator Chip
pickup.effect: Allows player to override electronic security locks

encounters.trigger: Defeating the enforcer disables the local alarm grid, opening the gate to the Data Hub.

encounters.hazard: Data-glitch zones that scramble movement inputs

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Temporarily freezes enemy circuitry and slows movement

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the encrypted keycard from the sentinel forces the main ventilation shaft to open.

encounters.hazard: Radiating steam pipes causing damage over time

pickup.name: Quantum Singularity Core
pickup.effect: Highly unstable power source required to initiate the final boss chamber sequence

encounters.trigger: Clearing the parasite activates the final elevator to the Obsidian Spire.

boss.name: Archivist Prime
boss.victory_condition: Overload the boss core by placing the Quantum Singularity Core into its chest port

output.objective: Infiltrate the Obsidian Spire and reclaim the stolen consciousness data from the Archivist Prime.
output.reward: The ability to manipulate local city infrastructure and a unique Artificer suit upgrade.

output.setting: A floating data-center garden filled with holographic glowing flowers and mischievous robotic hummingbirds

pickup.name: Conductive Dewdrop
pickup.effect: Increases electrical conductivity of surroundings

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sparrow causes the greenhouse gate to spark open revealing the server farm path

pickup.name: Amplifier Core
pickup.effect: Powers up staff range to hit distant targets

encounters.trigger: The slime dissolves into a data-stream that teleports the player directly to the central mainframe core

pickup.name: Overload Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the boss chamber override

encounters.trigger: Using the Overload Key bypasses the final firewall to face the Master CPU

boss.name: Synthesized Jester AI
boss.victory_condition: Force a hard reboot by inputting the Overload Key into the Jester AI's motherboard during a vulnerable state

output.objective: Restore harmony to the whimsical cloud-network by neutralizing the corrupted Jester AI
output.reward: Digital Harmony Shard and a permanent lightning aura cosmetic upgrade
